title: Herby Mingle Delight
description: A comforting Irish dish featuring a mixture powder with herbs and vegan-friendly components for a juicy, herbal experience.

ingredients.name: Clove of garlic
ingredients.notes: whole, lightly crushed for a herby aroma

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Prepare the vegetable skewers by washing and marinating them with olive oil and herb mixture powder. Grill until slightly charred and tender.
In a small bowl, mix together the garlic cloves, crushed thyme leaves, and a bit of olive oil. Mix well to make a paste-like consistency.
Gently apply the herb mixture to the grilled vegetables before serving for an extra burst of flavor.
